weekly picks (Mar 2 week 2026)

Posted on March 9, 2026 in 2026mar,  Daily t.me,  adsabs,  g scholar

A WordCloud of 2026 Mar 2nd week collection

===This week’s pick===

  • Score :
Unfold/Fold

03/12

  1. s41467-026-70590-1 Polarity-tunable field-free room-temperature spin orbit torque switching via topological symmetry breaking in an all-vdW heterostructure for spin logic applications (Nature Communications)
